We use cookies to personalise content and ads, to provide social media features and to analyse our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners who may combine it with other information that you’ve provided to them or that they’ve collected from your use of their services.

About
Cookies are small text files that can be used by websites to make a user's experience more efficient.  
  
The law states that we can store cookies on your device if they are strictly necessary for the operation of this site. For all other types of cookies we need your permission.  
  
This site uses different types of cookies. Some cookies are placed by third party services that appear on our pages.  
  
You can at any time change or withdraw your consent from the Cookie Declaration on our website.  
  
Learn more about who we are, how you can contact us and how we process personal data in our Privacy Policy.  
  
Please state your consent ID and date when you contact us regarding your consent.

## 퀀텀으로 불가능을 재구성하기

낙관주의와 맞춤형 서비스로 고객의 야망을 뒷받침합니다.

## 솔루션
## 하드 과학을 통한 혁신
광자 양자 컴퓨터: 모듈식, 확장 가능,에너지 효율적이며 클라우드 및 온프레미스에서 액세스할 수 있습니다.
저희는 적시 배송을 위해 최선을 다하고 있습니다. 과대 광고는 없습니다.
![](https://www.quandela.com/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/front-page/mosaiq.svg)
### 모자이크
대표적인 포토닉 양자 컴퓨팅 플랫폼입니다;
모사이큐는 차세대 포토닉 양자 컴퓨팅 알고리즘과 프로토콜의 프로토타이핑, 개발 및 구현을 위해 순수하고 고품질의 온디맨드 광자를 범용적으로 조작할 수 있는 문을 열어줍니다.
[모자이크 빌드](https://www.quandela.com/ko/products-and-services/mosaiq)
![](https://www.quandela.com/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/front-page/cloud.png)
### 클라우드
필요에 따라 맞춤화된 최첨단 플랫폼.
고급 양자 솔루션을 발견, 학습, 테스트 및 개발할 수 있는 포괄적이고 접근 가능한 플랫폼입니다.
[클라우드로 빌드하기](https://www.quandela.com/ko/products-and-services/cloud)
![](https://www.quandela.com/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/front-page/perceval.svg)
### PERCEVAL
오픈 소스 양자 광자 개발 툴킷.
Perceval은 광자 양자 회로와 알고리즘을 시뮬레이션, 설계, 실험할 수 있는 Python 기반 프레임워크를 제공합니다. 광학 구성 요소 구성, 포크 상태 조작, 시뮬레이션 실행을 위한 강력한 도구를 제공하여 양자 컴퓨팅의 이론적 개념과 실제 구현 사이의 간극을 메워줍니다.
[Perceval로 구축하기](https://www.quandela.com/ko/products-and-services/perceval)
![](https://www.quandela.com/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/front-page/promethues.svg)
### PROMETHEUS
선도적인 독립형 퀀텀닷 기반 단일 광자 소스입니다.
Prometheus는 단일 광자를 기록적인 속도로 생성하고 감지하는 올인원 장치로, 구별하기 어려운 광자의 안정적인 스트림을 제공합니다. 모듈식 설계를 통해 연구자와 엔지니어는 많은 수의 광학 큐비트를 포함하는 새로운 실험과 애플리케이션 개발에 집중할 수 있습니다.
[Prometheus로 구축하세요](https://www.quandela.com/ko/products-and-services/prometheus)
## 프로그램
## 양자 가속 프로그램
![](https://www.quandela.com/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/front-page/program.png)
## 양자 컴퓨팅은 연구실에서 엔터프라이즈로 이동했습니다.
콴델라 양자 가속 프로그램은 양자 전환을 위한 관문입니다. 양자 기술에 대한 탐색과 심층적인 이해부터 양자 우위 분석의 고급 단계와 온프레미스 콴델라 하드웨어 제공에 이르기까지 조직을 안내합니다.
[자세히 알아보기](https://www.quandela.com/ko/products-and-services/quantum-acceleration-programme/)
## 함께 일하는 사람
## 비즈니스 궤도에 활력을 불어넣으세요
양자 컴퓨팅으로 비즈니스를 한 단계 끌어올리세요. 저희는 기업이 양자 기술을 활용하여 비즈니스 과제를 해결할 수 있도록 지원합니다. 최첨단 양자 솔루션을 제품에 통합하는 방법을 확인해보세요.

## 고객 사례
## 전 세계 비즈니스 리더에게 영향력 행사
당사와 함께 일한 우수하고 용감하며 대담한 기업들의 선택 후기를 소개합니다.
우리가 제공하는 의미 있는 솔루션을 강조하는 가장 좋은 방법입니다.
“ _By joining forces with Quandela, we affirm our position as a pioneer in the advent of quantum computing serving industrial transformation. This alliance marks a major turning point: it contributes to the creation of an unprecedented ecosystem for the provision of innovative, high-performance, and proven services to all our clients._ ”
Fatih Balyeli
CEO and co-founder - Exaion Company
![Fatih Balyeli logo](https://www.quandela.com/ko/wp-content/uploads/avatar/exaion-1.svg)
“ _During a collaborative internship project in spring 2023, we worked with Quandela's technology and observed significant improvements in performance and response times throughout the project. Access to a high-performance cloud platform like Quandela's is essential, especially considering the rapid pace of technological evolution. This approach offers advantages over maintaining on-site hardware._ ”
Alain Refloch
High-Performance Computing Project Manager - ONERA
![Alain Refloch logo](https://www.quandela.com/ko/wp-content/uploads/avatar/onera.png)
“ _Quandela has proactively addressed the issue of MAPF (Multi Agent Path Finding). Their open and honest exchanges reflect a constant commitment to finding solutions, despite the current global quantum hardware limitations, and the need to further challenge quantum-based software solutions. Both our companies have learned a great deal from this study._ ”
Laurent MIRALLES
Head of Massy Prototyping Engineering Unit - Safran Electronics & Défense
![Laurent MIRALLES logo](https://www.quandela.com/ko/wp-content/uploads/avatar/ss.png)
“ _OVHcloud is delighted to support Quandela as a European quantum ecosystem player. Acquiring the QPU MosaiQ will allow us to pave the way for quantum cloud computing, expanding our R &D horizons to grow together in this fascinating field._”
Miroslaw Klaba
R&D Director - OVHcloud
![Miroslaw Klaba logo](https://www.quandela.com/ko/wp-content/uploads/avatar/ovhcloud-1.svg)

<style id="wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css">

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip: rect(1px,1px,1px,1px);
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text:focus {
			background-color: #eee;
			clip: auto !important;
			clip-path: none;
			color: #444;
			display: block;
			font-size: 1em;
			height: auto;
			left: 5px;
			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;
			top: 5px;
			width: auto;
			z-index: 100000;
		}
</style>

            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 6vw 0;
        }

        }

            width: 100%;
        }

            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 10px;
        }

            width: 100%;

            cursor: pointer;
            position: fixed;
            top: 10vh;
            right: 6vw;
            z-index: 1001;
        }

            display: none;
        }

        .menu-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.95);
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 1000;
        }

        .menu-content {
            position: absolute;
            top: 20vh;
            text-align: center;
        }

            list-style-type: none;
            padding: 0;
        }

<script>
    let menuIcon = document.getElementById('menu-icon');
    let closeIcon = document.getElementById('close-icon');
    let menuOverlay = document.getElementById('menu-overlay');
    let body = document.body;

    function toggleMenu() {
        menuOverlay.classList.toggle('active');
        body.classList.toggle('no-scroll');

        if (menuOverlay.classList.contains('active')) {
            menuIcon.style.display = 'none';
            closeIcon.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            menuIcon.style.display = 'block';
            closeIcon.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    menuIcon.addEventListener('click', toggleMenu);

    closeIcon.addEventListener('click', toggleMenu);

    document.querySelectorAll('.menu-title').forEach(function(title) {
        title.addEventListener('click', function() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.mb-dropdown-children').forEach(function(dropdown) {
                dropdown.style.height = '0'; // Đặt chiều cao của tất cả các mục con về 0
            });

            const dropdown = this.nextElementSibling;
            if (dropdown.style.height === '0px' || dropdown.style.height === '') {
                dropdown.style.height = dropdown.scrollHeight + 'px';
            } else {
                dropdown.style.height = '0';
            }
        });
    });
</script>

    <style>
        .navbar {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-around;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-name {
            color: white;
            text-decoration: none;
            padding: 10px 10px;
            display: flex;
            gap: 5px;
            align-items: center;
            word-break: keep-all;
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-name:hover {
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);
            /*background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--type-white-tertiary);*/
            color:  var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);
        }

        .navbar .dropdown-name:hover svg {
            fill:  var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);
        }

        .navbar .dropdown-active {
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);
            color:  var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue) !important;
            background-color: #455dec29;
        }

        .navbar .dropdown-active svg {
            fill:  var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);
        }

        .navbar .dropdown {
            display: inline-block;
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-content {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            background-color: var(--wp--preset--color--type-white-primary);
            width: 100%;
            box-shadow: 0px 8px 16px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            z-index: 100;
            left: 0;
            padding: 2em 0;
        }

        .navbar .dropdown-item-wrapper {
            display: grid;
            gap: 10px;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
            padding: 1em; /* Adjust padding as needed */
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-item {
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            text-decoration: none;
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-title {
            display: flex;
            gap: 24px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
            justify-content: space-between;
            color: var(--wp--preset--color--type-black-primary);
            padding-bottom: 0rem;
            border-bottom: thin solid var(--wp--preset--color--grey-dark);
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .navbar .dropdown-item svg {
            fill: #0c0c0c;
        }

        .navbar .dropdown-item:hover {
            /*background-color: #f1f1f1;*/
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-summary {
            color: var(--wp--preset--color--grey-dark);
            margin-bottom: 0px;
            line-height: 1.5em;
            height: 3em;
        }
        .navbar .dropdown-item:hover {
            .dropdown-title {
                color: var(--wp--preset--color--brand-orange);
            }

        }
        .navbar .dropdown-sub-link {
            color: var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);;
        }

        .navbar .part-title {
            font-size: 20px !important;
            border-bottom: none;
            justify-content: center;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);;
        }
    </style>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Get all dropdown elements
        let dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown');

        // Add click event listener to each dropdown
        dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
            let dropdownName = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-name');
            let dropdownContent = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-content');

            dropdownName.addEventListener('click', handleFocus);
            dropdownName.addEventListener('mouseover', handleFocus);
            function handleFocus (event) {
                event.preventDefault();


                if (dropdownContent.style.display === 'none' || dropdownContent.style.display === '') {
                    dropdownContent.style.display = 'block';
                    dropdownName.classList.add('dropdown-active')
                }

                dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
                    let dropdownName = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-name');
                    let dropdownContent = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
                    if (!dropdown.contains(event.target)) {
                        dropdownContent.style.display = 'none';
                        dropdownName.classList.remove('dropdown-active')
                    }
                });

            }
        });

        let isMouseInside = false;
        const navbar = document.querySelector('.navbar')

        navbar.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            isMouseInside = true;
        });

        function handleClickOut(event) {
            if (isMouseInside) return;
            dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
                let dropdownName = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-name');
                let dropdownContent = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
                if (!dropdown.contains(event?.target)) {
                    dropdownContent.style.display = 'none';
                    dropdownName.classList.remove('dropdown-active')
                }
            });
        }

        navbar.addEventListener('mouseleave', (event) => {
            setTimeout(() => {
                handleClickOut(event);
            }, 500)
            isMouseInside = false;
        });
        document.addEventListener("scroll", handleClickOut);
        document.addEventListener('click', handleClickOut);

    });
</script>

<p class="has-type-white-tertiary-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-ace954e59551a48d24eea7f66ec503d1">모사이큐는 차세대 포토닉 양자 컴퓨팅 알고리즘과 프로토콜의 프로토타이핑, 개발 및 구현을 위해 순수하고 고품질의 온디맨드 광자를 범용적으로 조작할 수 있는 문을 열어줍니다.</p>

<script>
    window.addEventListener('load', function () {
        initSmoothScrolling('.rbl-slider-block', 'smoothscroll');
    });

    function initSmoothScrolling(containerSelector, animation) {
        var container = document.querySelector(containerSelector);
        var slider = container.querySelector('.animation');
        var slides = slider.children;
        var sliderWidth = 0;
        var animationWidth = 0;
        var sliderHeight = slides[0].offsetHeight;

        // Calculate the total animation width
        Array.from(slides).forEach(function (slide) {
            animationWidth += slide.offsetWidth;
        });

        // Detect number of visible slides
        var slidesVisible = Math.ceil(container.offsetWidth / slides[0].offsetWidth);

        // Clone slides for infinite scrolling effect
        for (var i = 0; i < slidesVisible; i++) {
            slider.appendChild(slides[i].cloneNode(true));
        }

        // Recalculate total width after cloning
        Array.from(slider.children).forEach(function (slide) {
            sliderWidth += slide.offsetWidth;
        });

        // Set the slider dimensions
        slider.style.width = sliderWidth + 'px';
        slider.style.height = sliderHeight + 'px';

        // Calculate animation duration based on slide count
        var slidesNumber = slides.length;
        var animationDuration = slidesNumber * 2; // 2 seconds per original slide

        // Create and inject the animation CSS
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.type = 'text/css';
        var keyframes = `
        @keyframes ${animation} {
            0% { transform: translateX(0); }
            100% { transform: translateX(-${animationWidth}px); }
        }
        ${containerSelector} .animation {
            animation: ${animation} ${animationDuration}s linear infinite;
        }
    `;
        style.innerHTML = keyframes;
        document.head.appendChild(style);

        // Add event listener to reset animation when it completes
        slider.addEventListener('animationiteration', function () {
            slider.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
        });
    }
</script></div></div>

    function populateCarousel() {
        const carouselComponent = document.querySelector('#carousel-jobs');

        jobs.forEach((job) => {
            const carouselItem = document.createElement('div');
            carouselItem.classList.add('carousel-item');

            const link = `https://apply.workable.com/quandela/j/${job.shortcode}`;
            const jobContent = `
                <div style="border-right: 1px solid #ffffff60; padding: 20px; min-height: 150px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; flex-direction: column;">
                    <div>
                         <a class="q-custom-style-link-with-icon" target="_blank" href="${link}" class="job-link"
                            style="height: 40px; line-height: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; text-decoration: none; gap: 20px; font-weight: bold;">
                            <div>${job.title}</div>
                        </a>
                    </div>

                    <div>
                        <div style="margin-top: 10px">${JSON.parse(job.department)[0]}</div>

                        <div style="margin-top: 10px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);" >${job.region}, ${job.city}, ${job.country}</div>
                        <div style="margin-top: 20px" class="wp-block-button is-style-outline">
                                <a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="${link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
                                    Apply now    </a></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
            carouselItem.innerHTML = jobContent;
            carouselComponent.appendChild(carouselItem);
        });

        buildCarousel('carousel-jobs', 3, true);
    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', populateCarousel);
</script>

<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerHTML = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
</script>
